resources.string: Shows the next upcoming rocket launch with countdown
Shows a list of upcoming rocket launches
Shows detailed countdown timer for the next rocket launch
SCHEDULE UPDATE: Next attempt no earlier than %s
The launch was a partial failure.
Liftoff! Launch vehicle is now in flight!
Launch attempt in less than one minute at %s
Launch attempt in less than ten minutes at %s
Launch attempt in less than one hour at %s
Launch attempt in less than 24 hours at %s
